x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for HR Service Delivery is entitlement and plugin gated. Without the active plugin, all Now Assist HRSD capabilities including case summarization, knowledge suggestions, and AI-assisted intake are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for HR Service Delivery (sn_hr_gen_ai) via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm HRSD Now Assist SKU entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.
